summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Alberto Filgueiras website iteration 3. All 20 requested features verified and passing. Major changes confirmed: Hero updated with 'PhD em Neurociência Cognitiva' and specialist text, 10% discount popup for Programa Cérebro em Alta Performance, About page merged into Home, 'Fortaleza Emocional' renamed to 'Cérebro em Alta Performance' everywhere, Services page has unique WhatsApp messages per service, Contact page has LinkedIn instead of location.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mock.js - no real backend implementation
Contact form submission shows toast but doesn't actually send data anywhere
Login form is non-functional (just shows toast, no actual authentication)
Note: 'Pós-Doutorado em Educação Física: UCB' is present in education - this is DIFFERENT from the removed 'Pós-Doutorado em Ciências do Esporte: UCB'
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 3 of frontend-only prototype. All data is mocked. Backend is not implemented. Key changes verified: 1) Hero shows 'PhD em Neurociência Cognitiva' in smaller green font 2) Hero has specialist text about psychology and neuroscience 3) 10% discount popup appears for Programa Cérebro em Alta Performance (30 days, uses sessionStorage) 4) Hero has only 'Agendar Consulta' button (no Serviços link) 5) Features section says 'Inteligência Emocional' not 'Excelência Emocional' 6) Photo carousel has 5 images including coaching and trophy photos (no Dunbar) 7) About page/tab completely removed - no 'Sobre' in navigation 8) Bio section 'Quem Sou Eu' is on Home page 9) Education section on Home page before Trajetória Profissional 10) No 'Pós-Doutorado em Ciências do Esporte: UCB' in education 11) Auto-scrolling logo carousel with 14 institution logos 12) Achievements, YouTube videos, Research areas all on Home page 13) Navigation shows 'Cérebro em Alta Performance' not 'Fortaleza Emocional' 14) /programa-cerebro-alta-performance route works 15) Cérebro em Alta Performance page uses new name throughout 16) Cérebro em Alta Performance WhatsApp says 'Programa Cérebro em Alta Performance' 17) Services page has unique WhatsApp per service with adapted messages 18) Services page title says 'Serviços' not 'Serviços de Consultoria' 19) Contact page has LinkedIn instead of location 20) Footer links updated (no Sobre, has Cérebro em Alta Performance)
